# ZeroBounce AI

> ZeroBounce AI is an AI-powered email verification platform that delivers 98%+ accuracy with catch-all confidence scoring, email pattern recognition, and domain reputation intelligence. We help businesses verify email addresses, reduce bounce rates, and protect sender reputation.

## Core Product

- [Email Verification Tool](https://zerobounceai.com/free-tools): Free email verification with AI-powered catch-all scoring, disposable detection, and pattern recognition.
- [Email Checker](https://zerobounceai.com/email-checker): Check if any email address is valid, deliverable, and safe to send.
- [Email Verifier](https://zerobounceai.com/email-verifier): AI-powered email verification with confidence scoring for catch-all domains.
- [Free Email Verification](https://zerobounceai.com/free-email-verification): 100 free email verifications with no credit card required.

## Key Features

- **AI Confidence Scoring (0-100)**: Instead of returning "unknown" for catch-all domains (~30% of business emails), we provide a probability score predicting email validity.
- **Email Pattern Recognition**: AI learns naming conventions across companies to predict valid addresses.
- **Domain Reputation Intelligence**: Trust scoring for email domains to identify risky senders.
- **Real-Time API**: Sub-2-second email verification for signup forms and CRM integrations.
- **Bulk Verification**: Upload CSV files and verify thousands of emails at once.
- **Email Finder**: Find email addresses by name and company domain.
- **Disposable Email Detection**: Identify temporary emails from 100+ throwaway providers.

## Pricing

- **Free Tier**: 100 free verifications, no credit card required
- **Starter**: $9/month for 5,000 verifications
- **Growth**: $29/month for 25,000 verifications
- **Scale**: $79/month for 100,000 verifications
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing for high-volume needs

## Provider-Specific Verification Guides

- [Gmail Verification](https://zerobounceai.com/verify/gmail): 99.2% accuracy on Gmail addresses
- [Outlook Verification](https://zerobounceai.com/verify/outlook): Catch-all scoring for Microsoft 365
- [Yahoo Verification](https://zerobounceai.com/verify/yahoo): 98.5% accuracy
- [ProtonMail Verification](https://zerobounceai.com/verify/protonmail): Privacy-focused verification
- [iCloud Verification](https://zerobounceai.com/verify/icloud): Apple ecosystem handling
- [Zoho Verification](https://zerobounceai.com/verify/zoho): SMB domain verification

## Company Email Format Database

Over 450 company email format lookups available at:
[Email Format Lookup](https://zerobounceai.com/free-tools)

Popular lookups: [Google](https://zerobounceai.com/email-format/google), [Microsoft](https://zerobounceai.com/email-format/microsoft), [Amazon](https://zerobounceai.com/email-format/amazon), [Apple](https://zerobounceai.com/email-format/apple), [Salesforce](https://zerobounceai.com/email-format/salesforce)

## API Documentation

- Base URL: `https://api.zerobounceai.com`
- Authentication: API key in header
- Single verification: `POST /verify-email`
- Bulk verification: Upload via dashboard
- Response includes: status, confidence score, is_catch_all, is_disposable, is_role_based
